name: Barwon Solar Farm and BESS

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2027-07 to 2027-07-31 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Vic dev approval Apr 2025; AEMO 5.3.4A connection approval May 2025; environment report exhibited Nov-Dec 2025. AU$195m project cost; 16-month build once construction starts. Pre-FID at 19 months post-award — Elgin/CIP progressing but no public FC.

operational_notes: Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP) is now majority owner of Elgin Energy. CIS T1 award covers full 250 MW solar + 500 MWh BESS scope. Vic dev approval Apr 2025. AEMO 5.3.4A connection approval secured May 2025. Environment report exhibited Nov-Dec 2025. AU$195m. 16-month build once construction commences. Pre-FID at 19 months post-award.
